creator: saken@hotel.rmta.org
text:
The version of rc in the ports collection is outdated,  The latest
	version (1.5b2) is over a year old and solves some outstanding
	problems with the current version, make trip reveals no errors and
	"limit" no longer causes a core dump.

	I contacted the MAINTAINER <erich@freebsd.org> seven days ago and
	have not had a reply.

Fix: Apply the following patch with patch -p1, note I've configured rc to
	build using "-static", as it was discussed awhile ago in freebsd-ports
	that this is the "best" way to build shells.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
